rulings.Calendar Matter: Petition To Determine Validity Of Purported Trust And To Impose Constructive Trust
rulings.Rulings: hearing. appearance required. Mr. Collins contacted the Court requesting a continuance, but that request was not accompanied by a Stipulation signed by Mr. Helbraun, opposing counsel. Counsel will be asked to update the Court on the status of this matter. no hearing notes will be sent as nothing substantive has been filed since June of 2016.

rulings.Case Title: IN RE: ROBERT A. NAIFY LIVING TRUST DATED FEBRUARY 8, 1991
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petition For Relief For 1breach Of Oral Agreement Promise Of An Inheritance 2breach Of Fiduciary Duty 3return Of Trust Property 4double Damages And 5award Of Attorneys Fees
rulings.Rulings: continued to February 15, 2017 for proper notice of the amended petition (notice given February 4 for hearing on February 17, which is less than 30 days). New notice must be mailed for the new hearing date and new proof of service filed no later than February 9, 2017. In addition, Counsel must provide a file stamped hard copy of the amended petition to the examiner no later than February 9.
